name: loop-monorepo

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @loop/ui && npm run typecheck --workspace loop
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @loop/ui && npm run lint --workspace loop

comment:overrides: Pin the shared RN runtime to the app's versions so the @loop/ui peer deps dedupe to a single copy (otherwise '*' peers pull latest and TS sees two react-native type identities).
